Um So I'll, I'll give you the rundown real quick as a little refresher uh on, on what we do as a company.
So Apartment IQ essentially is a fully automated market survey comp analysis tool where we update every 24 hours.
So there's no need for any sort of manual call arounds or survey swaps, data entry, anything like that.
When you and your team log in uh every single day, you're looking at the most up to date accurate information, we update overnight and then push all the data live at 7 a.m. Eastern every single day.
Um We have the ability to track any property in the United States as long as they have a property website with online leasing turned on, we can track uh any asset for you.
Um And then I'd say the last thing is everything that I'm gonna show you today and everything that's in our platform is powered by 100% publicly available data.
So I think the industry as a whole knows there are some lawsuits going on around the sharing of private data.
Um With us, don't have to worry about that.
Our whole business model is 100% public data directly from property websites.
Any questions around that?

If you're doing this manually, it takes a lot of time and the amount of time that you can get back to you and your team just by being able to log into a software and you have all this information readily available daily um to see where your units sit within the market, I think is uh extremely impactful.
